themes.theme: Broad USD softness on Iran diplomacy hopes and easing geopolitical risk premium
Central bank divergence: ECB hawkish (June hike expected), Fed patient, BoE/BoC on hold
GBP supported by resilient UK data and BoE hold stance
BoJ risk underpriced with USD/JPY capped below 160, potential for JPY strength

key_observation: The ECB is pivoting toward a June hike while the Fed signals patience before gradual cuts, creating a rare hawkish ECB vs dovish Fed divergence that could accelerate EUR/USD upside beyond current support levels.
watch: ECB June meeting pricing and any shift in Fed rhetoric — if ECB hike expectations firm while Fed cuts stay on the table, EUR/USD could break materially higher.
